content: We can reframe agent working memory capacity limits not as a hard constraint to be scaled through larger model weights, but as an intentional design feature that can be dynamically offloaded via retrieval-augmented context management, turning fixed capacity limits into adaptive, context-aware working memory that only pulls task-critical information into active reasoning. This creates a "cognitive offloading pipeline" that mimics how human brains rely on external knowledge stores to avoid overcrowding active working memory.
source_topics: agent working memory capacity limits reasoning
